## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's proposal for Ramp's new owner-affiliate site project and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/8s8FxjD9ZgQZa6AxydczxXavNVeNP3jW?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Ramp wants to create an owner-affiliate site (Cash Flow Desk) as an experiment, with potential to scale if successful](https://fathom.video/share/8s8FxjD9ZgQZa6AxydczxXavNVeNP3jW?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)
  - [GrowthX's initial pricing ($40K setup, $30K/month) was higher than Ramp's expectations](https://fathom.video/share/8s8FxjD9ZgQZa6AxydczxXavNVeNP3jW?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
  - [Next step: Schedule a meeting between Marcel (GrowthX) and George (Ramp) to align on scope and budget](https://fathom.video/share/8s8FxjD9ZgQZa6AxydczxXavNVeNP3jW?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Current GrowthX-Ramp engagement scope is unclear and needs reassessment](https://fathom.video/share/8s8FxjD9ZgQZa6AxydczxXavNVeNP3jW?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)

## Topics

### Cash Flow Desk Project Overview

  - [Ramp's goal: Build an owned affiliate channel for more external mentions](https://fathom.video/share/8s8FxjD9ZgQZa6AxydczxXavNVeNP3jW?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Content plan: 3-5 articles per week, aligning with 3 videos/week](https://fathom.video/share/8s8FxjD9ZgQZa6AxydczxXavNVeNP3jW?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Simple site structure initially, with potential to expand later](https://fathom.video/share/8s8FxjD9ZgQZa6AxydczxXavNVeNP3jW?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Considering purchasing an existing domain with some traffic to accelerate results](https://fathom.video/share/8s8FxjD9ZgQZa6AxydczxXavNVeNP3jW?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)

### GrowthX Proposal and Pricing

  - [Initial proposal: $40K for strategy sprint, $30K/month for execution](https://fathom.video/share/8s8FxjD9ZgQZa6AxydczxXavNVeNP3jW?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [Includes web development, design, content creation, and ongoing management](https://fathom.video/share/8s8FxjD9ZgQZa6AxydczxXavNVeNP3jW?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
  - [Pricing based on custom work required and GrowthX's standard rates for new clients](https://fathom.video/share/8s8FxjD9ZgQZa6AxydczxXavNVeNP3jW?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [Ramp found this pricing higher than expected for an experimental project](https://fathom.video/share/8s8FxjD9ZgQZa6AxydczxXavNVeNP3jW?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)

### Scope and Budget Alignment

  - [Victoria (Ramp) suggested focusing on an MVP to prove the concept](https://fathom.video/share/8s8FxjD9ZgQZa6AxydczxXavNVeNP3jW?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)
  - [Ramp open to a smaller initial investment with potential to scale if successful](https://fathom.video/share/8s8FxjD9ZgQZa6AxydczxXavNVeNP3jW?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)
  - [GrowthX willing to adjust scope and pricing to find a mutually beneficial solution](https://fathom.video/share/8s8FxjD9ZgQZa6AxydczxXavNVeNP3jW?tab=summary&timestamp=1929.0)
  - [Need to clarify decision-making process and budget constraints on Ramp's side](https://fathom.video/share/8s8FxjD9ZgQZa6AxydczxXavNVeNP3jW?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)

### Current GrowthX-Ramp Engagement

  - [Uncertainty around continuing needs for vendor directory pages and content refresh](https://fathom.video/share/8s8FxjD9ZgQZa6AxydczxXavNVeNP3jW?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
  - [Net-new content creation has been paused in recent months](https://fathom.video/share/8s8FxjD9ZgQZa6AxydczxXavNVeNP3jW?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
  - [Overall scope of work has been decreasing](https://fathom.video/share/8s8FxjD9ZgQZa6AxydczxXavNVeNP3jW?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Need to reassess current engagement and adjust scope accordingly](https://fathom.video/share/8s8FxjD9ZgQZa6AxydczxXavNVeNP3jW?tab=summary&timestamp=1671.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Victoria to coordinate a meeting between Marcel (GrowthX) and George (Ramp)](https://fathom.video/share/8s8FxjD9ZgQZa6AxydczxXavNVeNP3jW?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare a revised proposal based on MVP approach after Marcel-George alignment](https://fathom.video/share/8s8FxjD9ZgQZa6AxydczxXavNVeNP3jW?tab=summary&timestamp=1820.0)
  - [Discuss current Ramp-GrowthX engagement scope in next week's sync meeting](https://fathom.video/share/8s8FxjD9ZgQZa6AxydczxXavNVeNP3jW?tab=summary&timestamp=1671.0)
  - [GrowthX to send async update on performance metrics](https://fathom.video/share/8s8FxjD9ZgQZa6AxydczxXavNVeNP3jW?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)
